title: SV: method call not working without this. prefix

features.name: virtual method call without this prefix in constructor
features.description: Code should include a virtual method call without this. prefix inside a class constructor within an inheritance hierarchy
features.snippet:
class uvm_object; virtual function void print(); $display("Print"); endfunction endclass
class uvm_report_object extends uvm_object; function new(); print(); endfunction endclass
